fields.title: Inject compact memory index and add memory read action
fields.description: Once memory entries have summary metadata, tau should stop injecting full memory bodies into the system prompt. The model should see only an index of available memories and use the memory tool to fetch a full entry when the summary looks relevant.
fields.design: Update the frozen prompt rendering in extensions/tau/src/memory/format.ts and extensions/tau/src/services/curated-memory.ts to emit a compact <memory_index> containing id, scope, type, and summary only. Extend extensions/tau/src/memory/index.ts and extensions/tau/src/memory/renderer.ts with a read action that resolves an entry by id from canonical JSONL and renders the full memory cleanly. Update tool descriptions and prompt guidance so the model knows to read full memory before relying on a relevant summary. Keep the frozen snapshot behavior: writes update disk immediately and prompt injection refreshes on session boundaries only.
fields.notes: Suggested executor: smart. This task is integration-heavy across prompt rendering, tool surface, and UI.
